creator: cristjc@earthlink.net
text:
On Fri, Sep 07, 2001 at 08:13:34AM -0700, Ruven Gottlieb wrote:

[snip]

> >Description:
> I can't install xscreensaver via sysinstall.  It's not on the generated list, but it is on the list at the FreeBSD site.  It is in ports so I had to make it that way.
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Try to install xscreensaver with sysinstall.

It looks like the xscreensaver package is included in 4.4-RELEASE. It
was not in 4.3-RELEASE. I do not know why it was not.

I really don't see any problem to be fixed here. We can't go back and
change 4.3-RELEASE now. What would you like us to do? 
-- 
Crist J. Clark                           cjclark@alum.mit.edu
